non_goals: No production C++ is generated by this schema.

findings_summary: LV6 added to paying standard symbol set.
Reel size vector shapes corrected from [5] to [6].
Pay window storage standardized to row-major [4x6].
Paytable shape corrected from trace [9x6] to normalized symbol-keyed table with matrix view [12x7].
Collect resolution inserted into runOneSpin call path.
Blitz feature retained as FreeGameFeature_2 trace alias.
Free Spins SCAT evaluation remains ambiguous.

TRACE_COMPATIBILITY.NO_OF_SYMBOLS: Use STANDARD_SYMBOL_COUNT for ways iteration, not trace value 8.
TRACE_COMPATIBILITY.SYMBOL_COUNT: Use PAYTABLE_SYMBOL_COUNT only when indexing paytable rows.

freeGamenumCollect.note: Trace name retained as alias; table belongs to Blitz Spins.

freeGameCOROccur.note: Trace name retained as alias; table belongs to Blitz Spins.

PayTable.representation: symbol-keyed counts as strings; missing counts pay 0
PayTable.matrix_view: [12x7] for symbols HV1-HV5, LV1-LV6, SCAT and counts 0..6

SCAT.pay_style: pays anywhere per Game Rules sheet

core_data_structures.name: Symbol
core_data_structures.purpose: Canonical symbol identifier plus optional aliases for trace compatibility.

core_data_structures.name: ReelSet
core_data_structures.purpose: Owns six ordered reel strips and their sizes.

core_data_structures.name: WinBreakdown
core_data_structures.purpose: Separate ways, scatter, and symbol-hit accounting.

core_data_structures.name: FeatureState
core_data_structures.purpose: Feature-session state shared by Free Spins and Blitz Spins.

core_data_structures.name: GameState
core_data_structures.purpose: One round state from wager to payout.

state_objects.name: BaseGameState
state_objects.exit: Base evaluation and optional collect complete.

state_objects.name: FreeSpinState
state_objects.entry: FeatureSelection with Free Spins choice or enabled buy-bonus Free Spins option.

state_objects.name: BlitzSpinState
state_objects.entry: FeatureSelection with Blitz choice or enabled buy-bonus Blitz option.

state_objects.name: BuyBonusConfigState
state_objects.exit: Buy-bonus trigger mapped to configured feature option.

function_contracts.name: runOneSpin
function_contracts.purpose: Execute one paid base-game round and, when selected, one triggered feature session.

inputs.name: feature_choice
inputs.condition: Required only when 3+ base SCAT triggers feature selection.

pseudocode: Select BG1 or BG2 using ReelsetWeights.
Generate base PayWindow.
Resolve additional COR injection.
Evaluate ways and SCAT wins.
Resolve Collect wins.
If base SCAT count is less than 3, return base result.
If feature choice is FREE_SPINS, award free spins by base SCAT count and call FreeGameFeature_1.
If feature choice is BLITZ_SPINS, award blitz spins by base SCAT count and call FreeGameFeature_2.
Return total win and event trace.

function_contracts.name: generatePayWindow
function_contracts.purpose: Construct a visible row-major 4x6 pay window from one six-reel strip set.
pseudocode: For each reel 1..6, select one stop index from that reel size.
For each row 0..3, copy the symbol at stop+row modulo reel size into pay_window[row][reel].
Return the completed row-major window.

function_contracts.name: additionalCOR
function_contracts.purpose: Optionally inject extra COR symbols into an existing base-game pay window.
pseudocode: Sample corTrigger.
If No, return unchanged window.
If Yes, sample COR count from numCorWeight.
Build eligible cell list excluding COLLECT, SCAT, and WILD.
Place up to sampled count COR symbols in eligible cells without replacement.
Assign each added COR value from baseCORValueWeights.

function_contracts.name: waysWinCalculation
function_contracts.purpose: Evaluate left-to-right 4096 ways wins for standard symbols and calculate SCAT win separately according to the selected SCAT evaluation rule.
pseudocode: Identify unique standard symbols present on reel 1.
For each standard symbol, count matching symbol or WILD occurrences on consecutive reels from reel 1.
Stop at first reel with zero matches.
Multiply occurrence counts to compute ways.
Look up paytable by symbol and consecutive reel count.
Add paytable value times ways to ways_win.
Count SCAT symbols and calculate scatter_win using unresolved configured SCAT mode.
Return WinBreakdown.

function_contracts.name: waysWinCalculationWithMultiplier
function_contracts.purpose: Evaluate Free Spins ways and SCAT wins, applying the product of all visible WILD multipliers to ways wins only.
pseudocode: Assign each visible WILD a multiplier sampled from wildMult.
Evaluate base ways/scatter breakdown using waysWinCalculation semantics.
Compute product of every visible WILD multiplier; if no WILD is visible, product is 1.
Multiply ways_win by the product.
Do not multiply scatter_win.
Return WinBreakdown.

function_contracts.name: resolveCollect
function_contracts.purpose: Collect all visible COR and jackpot-valued COR symbols once for each visible COLLECT symbol.
pseudocode: Count COLLECT symbols on reels 1 and 6.
Sum visible COR and jackpot-valued COR xBet values.
Set collect_win = collect_count * cor_value_x_bet_sum * bet_fixed_coins.
Return CollectResult.

function_contracts.name: FreeGameFeature_1
function_contracts.purpose: Run a Free Spins session using FG1 for natural triggers and configured buy-bonus free reelsets for buy-bonus mode.
pseudocode: Initialize remaining spins to awarded spins and session_win to zero.
While remaining spins > 0, generate one Free Spins pay window.
Assign WILD multipliers and evaluate with waysWinCalculationWithMultiplier.
Add ways and scatter wins to session_win.
Count SCAT and add retrigger spins for 2/3/4/5/6 SCAT.
Decrement consumed spin and continue until no spins remain.
Return FeatureResult.

function_contracts.name: FreeGameFeature_2
function_contracts.purpose: Run Blitz Spins; trace name is retained as an alias but the feature is Blitz, not Free Spins.
pseudocode: For each Blitz spin, create an empty 4x6 Blitz window.
Sample one or two COLLECT symbols and place them on reels 1 and/or 6 with at most one COLLECT per reel.
For every non-COLLECT cell, sample COR occurrence.
If no COR appears, force one COR.
Assign exactly one COR value from goodCORTable and all other COR values from badCORTable over CORValues.
Resolve Collect for the Blitz window.
Add spin collect win to session_win.
Return FeatureResult after all Blitz spins.

free_spins.reelset: F1 for naturally triggered free spins; buy-bonus free spins use BB F2, BB F3, or BB F4 by scatter count.
free_spins.multiplier_application: All WILD multipliers on the window are multiplied together and applied to ways wins, whether or not those WILDs participate. Not applied to SCAT wins.
free_spins.exit: Exit when awarded and retriggered free spins are exhausted.

guarantees: at least one COLLECT per spin
at least one COR per spin
blitz_spins.good_bad_value_table_rule: For normal Blitz Spins, one COR per spin uses the Good table and all other CORs use the Bad table.
blitz_spins.exit: Screen resets every spin; exit when awarded Blitz spins are exhausted.

collect.trigger: At least one COLLECT visible with one or more COR/jackpot values visible.
collect.reward: Each COLLECT independently accumulates all visible COR and jackpot values, then values are multiplied by total bet.

event_flow: FeatureRetriggered when Free Spins SCAT awards spins

generatePayWindow: TC-BASE-001 through generated reel-window smoke tests in downstream Coder

unresolved_ambiguities.text: Scatter evaluation wording conflicts: game rules say Scatter pays anywhere; Implementation says Free Spins calculate left-to-right Scatter wins.
The phrase each symbol can be used once per winning combination is not formalized for duplicate counting in 4096 ways.

Buy-bonus Free Spins sheet says the entire ways win is multiplied by all Wilds till that reel, while base Free Spins rules say all window Wild multipliers multiply the win regardless of participation.

unresolved_ambiguities: Free Spins SCAT evaluation mode must remain configurable until clarified.
4096-ways duplicate-counting phrase remains not formally clarified beyond documented ways multiplication examples.
Buy Bonus trigger display count conflict remains unresolved.

missing_information.text: Coin denomination and configurable bet ladder beyond fixed 20 coin game cost.
Player-facing feature-buy availability and jurisdictional enablement rules.
Formal duplicate-counting rule for 4096 ways phrase: each symbol can be used once per winning combination.
